title: My Daily Routine
passage: Every day I wake up at 7 o'clock. I brush my teeth and take a shower. Then I eat breakfast. I usually have bread and milk. After breakfast, I go to school. I study English and math. I come back home at 3 o'clock. In the evening, I watch TV and play with my friends.

questions.question: What time does the person wake up?
What does the person have for breakfast?
What time does the person come back home?
